text: Filters are used to specify what materials an action should modify.
Copies a custom amount of voxel data from a tile to the voxel grid.
params: The source chunk coord in the tile cell to copy.
The destination coord in the cell voxel grid.
The source size in chunks to copy.

text: Copies a custom amount of voxel data from a tile to the voxel grid.
params: The source chunk coord in the tile to copy.
The destination coord in the cell voxel grid.
The source size in chunks to copy.

text: Copies a custom amount of voxel data from a tile to the voxel grid.
params: The source chunk coord in the tile to copy.
The destination coord in the cell voxel grid.
The source size in chunks to copy.
The voxel material filter to be copied. (See [sm.voxelTerrainCell.voxelFilter])

text: Copies a custom amount of voxel data from a tile to the voxel grid.
params: The source chunk coord in the tile to copy.
The destination coord in the cell voxel grid.
The source size in chunks to copy.

text: Sets empty voxel (below threshold) material and density in convex hull shape in the cell's voxel grid.
params: Table of vertices {[Vec3], ...} that make up the convex hull.
Hull margin added outside the hull.
Existing normalized density must be below threshold for fill to happen.
New material to set in convex hull.
New normalized density to set in convex hull.
Noise frequency of applied simplex noise. (Defaults to 1)
Noise intensity of applied simplex noise. (Defaults to 0)

text: Sets density in convex hull shape to the cell's voxel grid.
params: Table of vertices {[Vec3], ...} that make up the convex hull.
Hull margin added outside the hull.
The voxel material filter to overwrite. (Defaults to [sm.voxelTerrainCell.voxelFilter, sm.voxelTerrainCell.voxelFilter.all])
Noise frequency of applied simplex noise. (Defaults to 1)
Noise intensity of applied simplex noise. (Defaults to 0)

text: Sets material in convex hull shape in the cell's voxel grid.
params: Table of vertices {[Vec3], ...} that make up the convex hull.
Hull margin added outside the hull.
The voxel material filter to overwrite. (Defaults to [sm.voxelTerrainCell.voxelFilter, sm.voxelTerrainCell.voxelFilter.all])
Noise frequency of applied simplex noise. (Defaults to 1)
Noise intensity of applied simplex noise. (Defaults to 0)

text: Sets material in convex hull shape in the cell's voxel grid.
params: Table of vertices {[Vec3], ...} that make up the convex hull.
Hull margin added outside the hull.
The voxel material filter to overwrite. (Defaults to [sm.voxelTerrainCell.voxelFilter, sm.voxelTerrainCell.voxelFilter.all])
Noise frequency of applied simplex noise. (Defaults to 1)
Noise intensity of applied simplex noise. (Defaults to 0)

text: Writes the voxel data from a tile to the cell's voxel grid.
